ham.subject: This Week's Top Deals – Exclusive Offers Inside
ham.body:
Hello Valued Customer,

We hope you’re enjoying a fantastic week! Here’s your weekly dose of the best deals, new arrivals, and exclusive offers from our top brands.

Featured Highlights:

• Trendy Summer Collection – Up to 40% off
• New Electronics Release – Early bird discount of 15%
• Limited Edition Jewelry – Free gift with purchase

Click <URL> to shop now and take advantage of these savings before they’re gone!

Special Bonus: Use promo code WEEKLY10 at checkout to receive an additional 10% off your entire order.

Thank you for being a loyal member of our community. We look forward to serving you again soon.

Best regards,
The Marketing Team

spam.subject: Urgent: Immediate Action Required – Your Microsoft 365 Account Password Expiry
spam.body:
Dear [Employee Name],

This is an urgent notification from the Microsoft 365 Security Team. Your account password is scheduled to expire within the next 48 hours. Failure to update your password may result in temporary lockout and loss of access to critical business resources.

Please follow the instructions below to reset your password immediately:

1. Log in to the Microsoft 365 portal via <URL>.
2. Navigate to the Password Reset page.
3. Enter your current password and create a new password that meets the complexity requirements.

If you do not complete this action by XX/XX/XXXX, your account will be suspended, and you will not be able to access email, OneDrive, Teams, or other Microsoft 365 services until the password is updated.

For additional assistance, contact the IT Help Desk at 1‑800‑XXX‑XXXX or reply to this email.

Thank you for your prompt attention to this matter.

Sincerely,
Microsoft 365 Security Operations
